features: Introduced by revlon in 1993 charlie red is a sharp flowery fragrance
It is recommended for casual wear
description: Product Description Introduced by the design house of Revlon in the year 1993. This floral fragrance has a blend of violet, rose apricot, lily of the valley, fresh citrus, and plum. It is recommended for casual wear. Directions Spray lightly on pulse points such as the wrist, neck, and behind the ears. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources. See more
